meaning: n.批准,同意,支持,制裁,认可v.批准,同意,支持,鼓励,认可
examples: He may now be ready to sanction the use of force.
The government refused to sanction a further cut in interest rates.
The Security Council will consider taking future actions against sanction-busters.
Plans to sanction the digs and turn the site into a memorial have not gotten very far.
The sanction can be even worse for those litigants who are caught withholding critically important documents.
